description: A dust-choked chamber hidden beneath the base of the mountains. Laces hang from the stone ceiling like cobwebs. A dim light filters down from a hole in the ceiling above. Willy warned you not to enter, but here you are — Fred accidentally fell down the hole!

▓.description: Raw, jagged stone walls that sweat cold mountain moisture.

..description: Cold, damp stone floors covered in a layer of fine dust.

S.name: Stash of Freddista
S.description: A heavy wooden chest. Freddista's stash of stolen items.

item.name: Stolen Pasta
item.description: A box of dried spaghetti. It has Fred's name written on it in marker.
item.opened_description: The chest is open, and all the stolen pasta is gone.

onUse.successMessage: You recovered your stolen pasta! Freddista's crimes are laid bare!

F.name: Freddista's Stare
F.description: A chilling pair of eyes looking out from a dark portrait.

dialogue.text: "Your screams... they echo... even here..." whispers a voice from the shadows.

exit_up.name: Hole to the Surface
exit_up.description: A shaft of dim light from the Peak of Misery above. You could climb back up.

H.name: Hideout Hearth
H.description: A cold stone fireplace. It hasn't been used in years.

E.name: Escape Route
E.description: A low-hanging crawlspace leading further East into the mountain roots.
